posts.text: Enjoyed spending time with President Trump in my hometown of Cincinnati today. Great conversations with local workers about delivering lower costs, bigger paychecks, and better schools. We’ll do our part in Ohio. 🇺🇸 🇺🇸

The leading edge of our country begins at its center, right here in Ohio. It was an honor to keynote the opening of the Chabad House at Ohio State this weekend.

Video

I ran into a student who I met at the 2024 OSU - Penn State game, who told me back then that he was a Democrat before we had a chat. It was nice to see him again in a different context last week.

Video

The best way to bring down the cost of homes is to increase the supply & cutting the regulations that get in the way. That shouldn’t be controversial, it’s common sense.

Video

The President did a great job last night in laying out sensible energy policies to bring down electric bills for everyday Americans. In Ohio, I’ll ensure that hyperscalers pay for their own energy usage, and we’ll produce more energy too, to bring down costs for consumers.

It’s the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, and I’m grateful to hear tonight from a Commander-in-Chief who is actually proud of our country. Can’t deny that.

Video

The first part of addressing affordability is to undo the inflation crisis created by government overgrowth under Biden, but the other half is to increase wealth—by putting more money back in Americans’ pockets.

Video

Lower property taxes, lower electric bills, lower housing costs.

Bigger paychecks, better schools, more wealth creation.

Coming soon to Ohio.

Video

Physical health, mental health, and spiritual health go together. 🙏 💪🏼

Video
Victimhood is a choice. We choose success instead. It was an honor to keynote the opening & ribbon-cutting for the Chabad Student Center at Ohio State today. 💪🏼
U-S-A! Amazing wins over Canada, historic medals in men’s & women’s hockey. Incredible just now. 🏅🏅

Slashing property taxes & supporting public safety aren’t mutually exclusive. We just need strong executive leadership at the top.

Video

Mamdani just said the only way to avoid local property tax increases is to raise state taxes massively. It’s funny, Amy Acton effectively said the exact same thing last week when she criticized Ohio’s recent income tax cuts. Sorry folks, this is America, not a socialist hellscape.

We’re going to bring down property taxes, improve our schools, and preserve public safety. That requires a businessman, not a bureaucrat.

Video

Grateful to our dairy farmers across the state. Enjoyed spending time & learning from them this week. 🙏

Video

Jails shouldn’t be the most common way we deal with severe psychiatric illnesses. It’s past time to bring back mental health institutions & to do it in the right way. Great discussion with Sheriffs across our state, ahead of their training sessions today.

This is what Ohio under Amy Acton would look like. We won’t let that happen.


End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)

Mayor Mamdani: "We are forced to raid our rainy day fund, retiree benefit fund, and to increase property taxes"

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/EndWokeness/status/2023861277840609634#m
